articles.title: What are the consequences of Israel’s death penalty law for Palestinians?
articles.description: Israel has become the first country to vote in favour of capital punishment in the 21st century.

articles.title: Not mandatory to install pre-paid power meters: Centre in Lok Sabha
articles.description: Responding to supplementaries during Question Hour, Power Minister Manohar Lal Khattar rejected suggestions that the government was compelling consumers to adopt pre-paid meters in a manner similar to private companies.

articles.title: SC slams ‘complete failure’ of West Bengal administration, orders central forces
articles.description: The bench directed the officials to remain present online, adding that it would closely monitor compliance of its directions and the probe into the incident.

articles.title: Redmi Note 15 SE 5G Debuts in India With a Vegan Leather Finish: See Price
articles.description: Redmi Note 15 SE 5G has been launched in India as the latest addition to the Xiaomi sub-brand's Note 15 series. The handset is the special edition of the Redmi Note 15 5G, which was unveiled in...

articles.title: Cops injured as miscreants hurl stones in Bengal's Birbhum; 14 arrested
articles.description: According to police, the trouble began after an earthmover machine engaged in construction work near a graveyard accidentally dug into soil covering a grave.

articles.title: India’s Study-Abroad Evolution: Kochi, Singapore, and Cyber Security Lead the New Wave - IE Education
articles.description: India’s Study-Abroad Evolution: Kochi, Singapore, and Cyber Security Lead the New Wave  IE Education

topStories.title: What Is Benjamin Netanyahu's End Game In The Iran War?
topStories.description: US Israel war with Iran reflects differing strategic goals and regional impacts

topStories.title: Bush In Middle East? US Sends 3rd Carrier After Trump's 'Stone Age' Threat
topStories.description: The George HW Bush would have been the third US carrier strike group operating in the Persian Gulf region had a "laundry room fire" incapacitated the more advanced Gerald R Ford.

topStories.title: "Was Monitoring Till 2 AM": Chief Justice Raps Bengal Over Hostage Incident
topStories.description: "CBI Or NIA To Probe": Supreme Court On Judicial Officers Held Hostage In Bengal

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by US President Donald Trump on success: ‘Show me someone without an ego…’
topStories.description: Donald Trump's quote explores the dual nature of ego, highlighting its role in self-promotion and success while cautioning against its extremes.

topStories.title: Why Trump wants to fire Pam Bondi? Who will replace her?
topStories.description: President Trump is considering replacing Attorney General Pam Bondi with EPA administrator Lee Zeldin amid dissatisfaction over Bondi's performance and backlash from his base regarding the Epstein files.

topStories.title: Trump’s primetime speech on Iran war: Key takeaways
topStories.description: US president says Washington is 'getting very close' to achieving goals as he promises to bomb Iran into 'Stone Ages'.

topStories.title: Trump’s national address on Iran ’embarrassing, incoherent’
topStories.description: Harlan Ullman, a former senior US naval officer, has slammed President Trump’s address to the nation.

topStories.title: Trump claims ‘success’ in Iran in just 32 days compared to lengthy US wars
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran was the ‘bully of the Middle East’ but is ‘no longer a threat’.

topStories.title: Trump threatens to bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages’
topStories.description: President Trump says the US will bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages where they belong' by striking hard.

topStories.title: Trump urges countries ‘get involved’ in war on Iran if they can’t get fuel
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump says nations that rely on oil from the Strait of Hormuz should build up some delayed courage.

topStories.title: Why Amazon data centers in the Gulf are facing Iranian military strikes? Report says…
topStories.description: Amazon's cloud operations in Bahrain were damaged by an Iranian strike, according to a latest report. The attacks follows Iran's threats against American companies in the Middle East just a day earlier.

topStories.title: Tiger Woods declines 2027 Ryder Cup captaincy; can leave US for treatment
topStories.description: The 15-time major winner will focus on health following his car crash and subsequent DUI arrest on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Speech highlights: What US President said about Iran war ‘ending’? What it means for you?
dailyNews.description: President Trump addressed the rationale for the war against Iran, emphasising the need for military action for national security. He provided few new details and indicated no immediate end to the conflict, which could lead to inflation and rising prices for consumers.

dailyNews.title: ‘More confusion than clarity’: Analysts question Trump’s Iran war messaging in televised address
dailyNews.description: In the 19-minute-long televised address, while Trump spoke about almost completing the war objectives in Iran, he also threatened that Washington would strike Iran ‘extremely hard’ over the next two to three ⁠weeks and hit the country into the ‘Stone Ages.’

dailyNews.title: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
dailyNews.description: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices up 5% as Trump threatens of further escalation
dailyNews.description: Crude prices jumped over 5% after US President Donald Trump warned of hitting Iran “extremely hard” within weeks, dashing ceasefire hopes and deepening supply fears via Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Votes to independents will help BJP: Siddaramaiah in Davangere South
dailyNews.description: CM Siddaramaiah urges Davanagere South voters to support Congress in April 9 by-election, claiming BJP spreads misinformation and warning against independent candidates.

dailyNews.title: 7-month-old baby killed by stray bullet in Brooklyn shooting, police say
dailyNews.description: Seven-month-old Kaori Patterson-Moore was killed by a stray bullet in Brooklyn after a gunman on a moped opened fire on a crowded street, police say.

dailyNews.title: NYPD cop's killer convicted of manslaughter, not guilty of murder after split jury ordered to deliberate more
dailyNews.description: The man charged for killing NYPD Detective Jonathan Diller during a 2024 Queens traffic stop was convicted of manslaughter but acquitted of murder.

dailyNews.title: Sham Philadelphia coffee shop hiding crack operation busted in sweeping raid, 17 arrested: AG
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia officials dismantled a drug ring at a sham coffee shop in 'Operation Cocaine and Coffee,' arresting 17 and seizing 27 guns and drugs.

dailyNews.title: Former Cowboys player Trysten Hill appears to grin after arrest tied to alleged assault of pregnant woman
dailyNews.description: Former NFL player Trysten Hill was taken into custody in Ellis County, Texas, on charges of assaulting a pregnant woman and interfering with an emergency request for assistance.

dailyNews.title: Behind the scenes of Congress' eleventh-hour rush to fund the DHS
dailyNews.description: Congress used voice votes and rare procedural maneuvers to end the six-week DHS shutdown, with the House ultimately accepting the Senate-passed bill.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran ‘no longer a threat’ after 32 days — outlines next phase of US war
dailyNews.description: Trump declares Iran "no longer a threat" after a 32-day military campaign, claiming nuclear sites were destroyed by B-2 bombers and warning of more strikes.

dailyNews.title: Billy Porter blames Trump as jobs dry up after 'performative wokeness' wave
dailyNews.description: Billy Porter said the era of "performative wokeness" is over and arts job opportunities are drying up, speaking out on the shifting entertainment landscape.

dailyNews.title: Trump is right about NATO’s weakness; the real question is how does America fix it
dailyNews.description: The Strait of Hormuz crisis exposed NATO's deep fault lines as Germany refused to act and Spain denied airspace, revealing burden-sharing failures.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Colbert mocks Trump fans who still support the president: 'Who are you?'
dailyNews.description: Comedian Stephen Colbert took aim at the people who still support President Donald Trump during a scathing monologue on "The Late Show" Tuesday night.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration makes major move to relieve 'unfair burden' on DHS workers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: As the shutdown hits day 46, the Trump administration offered rare tax relief to DHS workers still reporting without pay, waiving penalties and interest.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Robert De Niro brushes off 'Trump Derangement Syndrome' label hurled by critics
dailyNews.description: Robert De Niro appeared at the Supreme Court to hear justices' oral arguments on a major case that the High Court is weighing and bashed the president on his way out.

dailyNews.title: 5 Takeaways From Trump’s Address on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump did not define a clear path out of the conflict, which he estimated would end within three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump Initially Laid Out Five Goals for the Iran War. Here’s Where They Stand.
dailyNews.description: The United States and Israel have done significant damage to Iran’s military capabilities. But Iran still fires missiles, has nuclear material and coordinates with militias in the region.

dailyNews.title: Senate and House Republicans Strike Deal to End DHS Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A bill to reopen the department, which the House G.O.P. rejected on Friday, could be approved as early as Thursday. It was a sharp turnaround by the lawmakers and President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Discussed Firing Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump has not made a final decision, but he has floated the idea of replacing Ms. Bondi with Lee Zeldin, the E.P.A. administrator.

dailyNews.title: Key Justices Appear Skeptical of Limiting Birthright Citizenship
dailyNews.description: President Trump appeared in court, watching as members of the court’s conservative majority raised questions about his efforts to limit birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Trump Attends Supreme Court Oral Arguments, Then Leaves an Hour In
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s presence in the court, a presidential first, put him face to face with justices whom he has tried to bully and intimidate.
